# Zenon Bridge

> Cross-chain token bridge for the Zenon Network ecosystem

Zenon Bridge is a decentralized application (dApp) that enables token wrapping, unwrapping, and swapping between Zenon Network and Ethereum/BSC blockchains.

## What It Does

- **Wrap**: Convert native Zenon tokens (ZNN, QSR) into ERC-20 wrapped tokens (wZNN, wQSR) on Ethereum
- **Unwrap**: Convert wrapped ERC-20 tokens back to native Zenon tokens
- **Swap**: Bridge tokens between Zenon Network and Ethereum in a single guided flow
- **Liquidity Staking**: Stake LP tokens to earn rewards in the Zenon ecosystem

## Supported Networks

- Zenon Network (internal chain)
- Ethereum Mainnet (external chain)
- BSC (Binance Smart Chain)

## Supported Tokens

- ZNN (Zenon) <-> wZNN (Wrapped Zenon, ERC-20)
- QSR (Quasar) <-> wQSR (Wrapped Quasar, ERC-20)

## How It Works

1. Connect a Zenon wallet (Syrius browser extension or WalletConnect)
2. Connect an Ethereum wallet (MetaMask or WalletConnect)
3. Choose to wrap, unwrap, or swap tokens
4. Follow the guided wizard flow to complete the transaction
5. Track request status in the bridge history

## Technology

- Built with React and TypeScript
- Uses Web3.js and Ethers.js for blockchain interaction
- Zenon SDK (znn-ts-sdk) for Zenon Network operations
- WalletConnect v2 for cross-platform wallet support
- Smart contract-based bridge with guardian validation

## Links

- Website: https://bridge.0x3639.com
- Source Code: https://github.com/0x3639/bridge-dapp
- Zenon Network: https://zenon.network
